comments:
OTPInput Props — Complete Schema-native property system.

## Design Philosophy

Props are the bridge between user configuration and component rendering.
Every visual property maps to a Schema pillar atom — no escape hatches.

## Schema Pillars Used

| Pillar     | Atoms                                        |
|------------|----------------------------------------------|
| Color      | RGB, Gradient                                |
| Dimension  | Pixel, Temporal (Milliseconds)               |
| Geometry   | Radius, Transform (Scale)                    |
| Typography | FontSize, FontWeight, FontFamily             |
| Elevation  | Shadow (LayeredShadow)                       |
| Motion     | Easing, Transition                           |
| Attestation| UUID5 (instance identity)                    |

## Prop Modifier Pattern

Components accept `Array (OTPInputProp msg)` which fold over `defaultProps`.

declarations.comments:
Complete OTP input configuration using Schema atoms.

All visual properties are typed Schema atoms. No strings for colors, sizes.
Instance identity via UUID5 ensures uniqueness at billion-agent scale.
declarations.title: OTPInputProps

declarations.comments:
Default properties with sensible Schema values.

Uses 6 digits (standard TOTP), empty value, numeric input.
All durations use Schema.Dimension.Temporal.Milliseconds.
declarations.title: defaultProps

declarations.comments: Enable/disable input masking (dots instead of characters)
declarations.title: maskedProp

declarations.comments: Set component state (Idle, Entering, Verifying, Success, Error)
declarations.title: stateProp

declarations.comments: Set resend cooldown duration in seconds
declarations.title: resendCooldownProp

declarations.comments: Set remaining resend cooldown time in seconds
declarations.title: resendRemainingProp

declarations.comments: Set instance ID (UUID5) for deterministic identity
declarations.title: instanceIdProp

declarations.comments: Set filled (has value) digit border color
declarations.title: filledBorderColorProp

declarations.comments: Set background gradient (takes precedence over solid color)
declarations.title: backgroundGradientProp

declarations.comments: Set focused digit box shadow (focus ring effect)
declarations.title: focusShadowProp

declarations.comments: Set error state box shadow (red glow)
declarations.title: errorShadowProp

declarations.comments: Set success state box shadow (green glow)
declarations.title: successShadowProp

declarations.comments: Set handler for OTP value changes
declarations.title: onDigitChangeProp

declarations.comments: Set handler for OTP completion (all digits filled)
declarations.title: onCompleteProp

declarations.comments: Set handler for resend button click
declarations.title: onResendClickProp

declarations.comments:
Set handler for digit input (character entered)
Called with (index, character) when a character is entered
declarations.title: onDigitInputProp

declarations.comments:
Set handler for digit delete (backspace)
Called with index when backspace is pressed at that digit
declarations.title: onDigitDeleteProp

declarations.comments:
Set handler for digit keydown (any key)
Called with (index, keyCode) for any keypress
declarations.title: onDigitKeyDownProp

declarations.comments: Set error shake animation duration (Schema Milliseconds)
declarations.title: shakeDurationProp

declarations.comments: Set success pulse animation duration (Schema Milliseconds)
declarations.title: pulseDurationProp

declarations.comments: Set digit entry animation duration (Schema Milliseconds)
declarations.title: entryDurationProp

declarations.comments: Set transition duration for state changes (Schema Milliseconds)
declarations.title: transitionDurationProp

declarations.comments: Set stagger delay between digit animations (Schema Milliseconds)
declarations.title: staggerDelayProp

declarations.comments:
Set separator positions (indices where separators appear)
e.g., [3] for 6-digit OTP = XXX-XXX
declarations.title: separatorPositionsProp

declarations.comments:
Enable/disable auto-advance behavior

When true (default), focus automatically advances to next digit after entry.
declarations.title: autoAdvanceProp

name: Hydrogen.Element.Component.OTPInput.Props
